author: Sara Jennifer
title: Looking for artist to color character
content: Looking for an artist for a quick gig to color a character in a super vibrant, eye catching style budget is around $80 but definitely negotiable so we can talk comment your rates below and drop a follow so I can shortlist and DM you. #Art #Hiring #Artist #Comms #Draw #XArtist

author: Jessica art
title: Looking for 2D Artist for commission
content: Looking for a 2D Artist I'm looking for a skilled 2D artist for a commission project. Strong sketching and line art skills Good communication Able to meet deadlines Experience with character illustrations is a plus If you're interested, please reply below or send me a DM

author: 💙Bezzie Tales💙
title: Looking for digital artists for layouts & backgrounds
content: We are shifting gears and looking for digital artists to help with layouts & backgrounds. Must be familiar with rubber-hose physics! DM Or @ us your portfolio and rates! Retweets appreciated! 💛 #ArtistSearch
